name: Cheskers
author: AGP port of Solomon W. Golomb's Cheskers (1948)
description: Solomon Golomb's 1948 chess/checkers crossover, played on the 32 dark squares. Each side has two Kings, a Bishop, a Camel and eight Pawns. Pawns and Kings move and capture by checkers jumps (forced capture); the Bishop slides and the Camel (a 1,3 leaper) capture by replacement. Capture all enemy Kings or stalemate the opponent.
